message:
Add stats dashboard module with precomputed analytics support

- Create dedicated stats.js module to handle analytics rendering
- Refactor viewer.js to delegate stats panel rendering to the new module
- Add comprehensive CSS styles for stats dashboard components:
  - Stats loading/error states with spinner animation
  - Time range display layout
  - Stats grid cards and sections
- Support loading precomputed JSON analytics (statistics.json, timeline.json, etc.)
- Fall back to database queries when precomputed files unavailable
- Add timeline view switching (daily/weekly/monthly)

This improves page load performance by using pre-generated analytics
files from the export process rather than computing stats on-the-fly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
